rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF OPHELIA C. HILTON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Continued to January 11, 2010. Declaration re fees was filed by Mr. Vann and care facility statements were filed, but no supplemental declaration has been filed as of this date and no Declaration re fees has been filed by Amy Harrington. Please note, if Ms. Harrington is waiving her fees, that waiver must be in writing. If she is not waiving fees, the petition must be amended to include those fees. No additional proof of service is on file for the persons who requested special notice and no proof of service is on file for Mr. Vann's Declaration re fees.
